query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN teacherFee = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_teacher_fee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN transportFee = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_transport_fee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN partnerFee < '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as negative_partner_fee
FROM orders
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-01-05';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN teacherFee = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_teacher_fee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN transportFee = '0.00' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as zero_transport_fee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN partnerFee < '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as negative_partner_fee
FROM orders
WHERE createdAt >= '2026-01-05';
